summary: No Win/Mac code fork detected. All business logic is single-source. However, 3 issues found: (1) stale embedded scripts in src-tauri/resources/scripts/, (2) legacy root-level scripts with old service lists, (3) no Mac CI workflow

issues.title: Stale embedded scripts in src-tauri/resources/scripts/
issues.description: apps/desktop/src-tauri/resources/scripts/start_all.sh and stop_all.sh are OLD versions with hardcoded paths (/Users/mofamaomi/...) and outdated service list (only 4 old services). They are NOT the same as scripts/mac/start_all.sh which has RUNTIME_ROOT resolution and current 6 services. The Tauri resource config references 'resources/scripts/start_all.sh' which embeds these stale files.

issues.title: Legacy root-level scripts with outdated service lists
issues.description: scripts/start_all.sh (55 lines) only starts 4 old services (model_gateway, plugin_manager, eval_engine, agent_orchestrator). scripts/start_all.bat references obsolete services (real_impl, agent_team, research_real, hyperframes). These are NOT used by the Tauri bundle but create confusion.

issues.title: No Mac CI workflow
issues.description: .github/workflows/ only has build-win-release.yml. There is no build-mac-release.yml. Mac builds are done locally only. This means Mac and Windows packages are NOT guaranteed to be built from the same commit automatically.

issues.title: Build INFO commits differ across platforms
issues.description: macos-c25-latest: d52ce18, macos-c25-runtime-autostart: 8603bfd, windows-c25-c12-msi-only: edf07e9, windows-c25-c13-runtime-resources: 4eb9866. All different commits - expected for now since they were built at different times, but a single CI pipeline would ensure same-commit builds.

lib_rs_platform_handling.description: lib.rs uses #[cfg(target_os = "windows")] and #[cfg(target_os = "macos")] properly. All business logic is shared. Platform differences are only in startup script invocation (PowerShell vs Bash) and path resolution. This is the correct pattern.

services_no_fork.description: No services/ subdirectory contains Windows-only or Mac-only variants. All Python service code is platform-agnostic.

rules: 4. Win/Mac 不允许各自复制一套业务代码
5. 平台差异只能在启动脚本(scripts/windows|mac)、打包资源、Tauri cfg、lib.rs #[cfg] 中处理
6. 所有包都必须从同一个 git commit 构建
8. Mac 和 Win 验收报告必须标明 build commit
